description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a glossy, deep teal finish. The sofa features a chaise lounge on the left side and a three-seat main section, both with attached, smooth-surfaced seat and back cushions. The armrests are cylindrical and padded, positioned at each end of the sofa, and are slightly lower than the backrest. The legs are short, dark, and slightly tapered, with a metallic or wooden appearance, and are placed at the corners for support. The upholstery is sleek and uniform, with no visible patterns or tufting, giving the sofa a contemporary and minimalist look. The overall structure is robust, with a solid frame likely made of wood or metal beneath the upholstery.
description: A glossy teal L-shaped sectional sofa with smooth, attached cushions, cylindrical armrests, and short tapered legs. The design is modern and minimalist, with a sleek, uniform finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, chaise lounge on the left, three-seat section, and both cylindrical armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the cylindrical armrest on the left end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length, with no visible cushions or armrest details.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the main seat section, right armrest, and the sofa's clean, straight profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached seat cushions and three attached back cushions, all uniform in size, with a sectional layout including a chaise lounge; cushions are smooth and not tufted.
attribute_armrest_style: Cylindrical, padded armrests present at both ends, slightly lower than the backrest, with a smooth, rounded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, tapered legs with a dark finish, likely wood or metal, positioned at the corners; legs are exposed and provide a slight elevation from the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a straight profile, segmented into three attached cushions, smooth and unadorned.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, glossy teal upholstery with a smooth texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
